Around the end of the third week, Mercury enters Aries. Do not take decisions, regarding any major financial involvement. There is no guarantee that you'll make money in your investments. Ganesha recommends that you sit down and take an honest look at your entire money life, before making any move. Check your personal expenses. No development oriented activities for now.
